characters.description: Badass Crew: They’ve managed to handle quite the number of fires over the course of the show. Big Damn Heroes: True to their jobs, the firefighters of Cal Fire are always running into danger to save people.

characters.name: Cal Fire
characters.description: Badass Crew: They’ve managed to handle quite the number of fires over the course of the show. Big Damn Heroes: True to their jobs, the firefighters of Cal Fire are always running into danger to save people.

characters.name: Bode Donovan
characters.description: Played by:Max Thieriot One of the show’s central characters. AKABode Leone. Addled Addict: He was this in prison thanks to Sleeper’s influence on him. This history is a main reason behind Bode’s efforts to stop Sleeper from spreading drugs in their camp when the latter arrives towards the end of the first season. All Girls Want Bad Boys: Both Rebecca, an inmate at the female fire camp, and Gabriella, a probationary firefighter, want to hook up with him, although he was incarcerated for robbing a liquor store. He was previously in a relationship with Cara, but that ended when he hurt his shoulder in Baseball. Lampshaded by Jake when Gabrielabreaks up with him so she can be with Bode. Black Sheep: As a drug addict and convict in a family of firefighters, he starts the series as a Black Sheep.Later subverted when he becomes a full-time Cal Fire Firefighter in Season 3.

characters.name: Sharon Leone
characters.description: Division Chief at Cal Fire, she spends considerable amounts of time running the scene and managing resources while the others handle the hoses and hand tools. She is Vince's wife and mother to Rileyand Bode. A Father to His Men: A female example. Treats everyone in Station 42 as family. This is helped along by Bode being her son and Eve and Jake having been at her house since they were young Da Chief: In Season 1 she is the division chief, over her husband and son's fire squads. Later steps down to receive a kidney transplant. Love Triangle: Subverted. Her brother-in-law Luke says he always wanted to be with her. When he openly propositions her she is furious, as she and Vince have been married for many years, and rejects his advances. Official Couple Ordeal Syndrome: With Vince. In nearly every episode, their marriage is tested and they have made it through everything the world and Bode can throw at them
